title: CI: Add github workflow to validate DEST_BRANCH
body: We keep forgetting to change DEST_BRANCH whenever a -rhel branch is created, so add this CI check that it is correct.

comments.body:

Well, if $CIRRUS_BASE_BRANCH works, why do we even need DEST_BRANCH in .cirrus.yml?
Hmm, the new workflow doesn't seem to run off the PR... How can I then test this...

> Well, if $CIRRUS_BASE_BRANCH works, why do we even need DEST_BRANCH in .cirrus.yml?

That is a question for @cevich who is no longer around, I am not sure if someone else can answer this. It might have some long history we do not know about

I guess i need to use `pull_request` instead of `pull_request_target` for the PR to actually run/test the new workflow. But if you don't want to use github actions, then maybe this is better just closed.

Some I did some digging and I think one of the reasons for DEST_BRANCH is that CIRRUS_BASE_BRANCH will not be set when it is not trigger by a PR, i.e. our nightly runs.

And yes github action for this is a NACK for me.
Well, I guess it could run in cirrus for PRs to validate .cirrus.yml which is then run in nightly runs.
